name: Chicken Cucumber Salad
description: Nutty delicious use of extra chicken

items: 柠檬汁 （1 片冰冻柠檬 ）

steps: steam chicken over boiling water for 15-20 minutes (cut raw chicken into small pieces if needed)
Chop cucumber and scallions thinly, and shred chicken
Make the sauce, and mix  in the cucumber, chicken, and scallions and
